title: Autofarm Mod
description: Right-clicking a crop lets the crop for now on plant and replant itself forever
body:
# Autofarming Mod
This Mod lets you completely automate your crops without annoying or laggy machines you have to build. Just right-click a crop like Wheat, Carrots or Potatoes with a Diamond and the crop will forever replant/plant itself. You can right-click the crop at every moment of its growing state, and If you already right-clicked it with a dia, it won't consume a new diamond, so you don't invest one, when its already in auto harvest mode.

## Other Mod Crops
To be honest, I don't know If it will work with crops added via other mods, so I can't confirm If it will work or crash the game. When I have enough free time, I will test it, so when you see this Mod Status Tab in this description, this means I can't confirm If it works with other mods yet.

## Tip
You should make sure you don't right-click a crop accidentally, it could get "a bit" laggy with all the items.
